input.old_string:
The constructions of this chapter -- the universal quotient sheaf
\(\mathcal{U}\), the tautological quotient \(u\), and the functor of points -- rest
on two pieces of foundational machinery for sheaves of modules that are not
available off the shelf and are therefore set up here. The first is the predicate
``locally free of rank \(d\)'', which records that a sheaf of modules is, on the
members of some open cover, isomorphic to the trivial bundle \(\mathcal{O}^{d}\);
it is the condition cut out in the definition of the Grassmannian functor. The
second is a gluing primitive that descends a sheaf of modules (and a morphism of
such sheaves) from per-chart data along an open cover, given a transition cocycle
compatible with the cover's own gluing; it is the vehicle that assembles the
per-chart free sheaves \(\mathcal{O}^{d}_{U^I}\) and the per-chart quotients
\(u^I\) into the global \(\mathcal{U}\) and \(u\).

\begin{definition}
[Locally free of rank \(d\)]
  \label{def:is_locally_free_of_rank}
  \lean{AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.IsLocallyFreeOfRank}
  Let \(X\) be a scheme and \(\mathcal{M}\) a sheaf of
  \(\mathcal{O}_X\)-modules, and let
  \(d \in \mathbb{N}\). We say \(\mathcal{M}\) is \emph{locally free of rank
  \(d\)} if there exists an open cover \(\{U_i\}_{i}\) of \(X\) -- a family of
  opens with \(\bigcup_i U_i = X\) -- such that for each index \(i\) the
  restriction \(\mathcal{M}|_{U_i}\) of \(\mathcal{M}\) to \(U_i\) is isomorphic,
  as a sheaf of \(\mathcal{O}_{U_i}\)-modules, to the trivial rank-\(d\) bundle
  \[
    \mathcal{M}|_{U_i} \;\cong\; \mathcal{O}_{U_i}^{\,d}
      \;=\; \bigoplus_{k \in \{1,\dots,d\}} \mathcal{O}_{U_i},
  \]
  the free sheaf on the index set of size \(d\). This is the analogue, for the
  rank-\(d\) free model, of the ``open cover together with a local isomorphism''
  shape used to express quasi-coherence and local finite presentation: it
  asserts the existence of a trivialising cover on which \(\mathcal{M}\) acquires
  a basis of \(d\) sections. A sheaf that is locally free of rank \(d\) is in
  particular quasi-coherent and locally of finite presentation, and its fibre at
  every point is a \(d\)-dimensional vector space. This is the condition imposed
  on the member sheaf \(\mathcal{F}\) in a family of rank-\(d\) quotients
  (\cref{def:grassmannian_functor}); the universal sheaf \(\mathcal{U}\)
  (\cref{def:gr_universal_quotient_sheaf}) satisfies it tautologically, with the
  charts \(\{U^I\}\) as trivialising cover.
\end{definition}

\begin{definition}
input.new_string:
The constructions of this chapter -- the universal quotient sheaf
\(\mathcal{U}\), the tautological quotient \(u\), and the functor of points -- rest
on two pieces of foundational machinery for sheaves of modules. The first is the
predicate ``locally free of rank \(d\)'' (\cref{def:is_locally_free_of_rank}),
which records that a sheaf of modules is, on the members of some open cover,
isomorphic to the trivial bundle \(\mathcal{O}^{d}\); it is the condition cut out
in the definition of the Grassmannian functor. That predicate is the project-local
\(\mathrm{SheafOfModules.IsLocallyFreeOfRank}\) already set up in the Quot-scheme
chapter (\cref{def:is_locally_free_of_rank}), which this chapter reuses verbatim;
the only foundational machinery genuinely new to this chapter is the second piece:
a gluing primitive that descends a sheaf of modules (and a morphism of such
sheaves) from per-chart data along an open cover, given a transition cocycle
compatible with the cover's own gluing; it is the vehicle that assembles the
per-chart free sheaves \(\mathcal{O}^{d}_{U^I}\) and the per-chart quotients
\(u^I\) into the global \(\mathcal{U}\) and \(u\), and is set up below.

\begin{definition}

# Strategy

## Goal

Close the `sorry`-bearing nodes of the **Čech-independent leg** of the parent's
`thm:fga_pic_representability` cone (Kleiman FGA, "The Picard scheme", §4), then merge back:

- **FBC** — `lem:affine_base_change_pushforward` + `thm:flat_base_change_pushforward`
  (the i=0 base-change map `g^* f_* F ⟶ f'_* g'^* F` is an isomorphism).
- **GF** — `thm:generic_flatness` with algebraic core `thm:generic_flatness_algebraic`.
- **QUOT** — `def:hilbert_polynomial`, `def:quot_functor`, `def:grassmannian_scheme`,
  `thm:grassmannian_representable`.

End-state: zero project `sorry` in the 29-node closure, zero project axioms, kernel-only axioms.
Names/labels are the parent's so finished work merges back into its A.2.c engine.

## Phases & estimations

| Phase | Status | Iters left | LOC | Key Mathlib needs | Risks |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| FBC (A1 keystone + A2 affine + B global) | PARKED | — | ~380–920 | conjugate-recognition; `IsIso` locality for `SheafOfModules`; H⁰-equalizer | Keystone `_legs_conj` hit FINAL kill-criterion, NO fresh route — highest-risk Goal leg (see Routes). Un-parks when a lane frees |
| GF-geo — `genericFlatness` (G1→G3→close) | ACTIVE | 3–5 | ~150–350 | epi-preserving geometric `pullback U.ι`; X.Modules↔Spec transport; `flat_of_isLocalized_maximal` | Over budget. Sole open seam-1 piece = 1a `gf_localGenerators_restrict` (concrete `overRestrictPullbackIso` route); if 1a stalls again, pivot |
| GR-quot/repr — taut. quotient + representability | ACTIVE‖ | 6–12 | ~400–1000+ | Archon-original module-gluing over `Scheme.GlueData`; `Functor.RepresentableBy` | Cells/glue/sep/proper + chapter DONE. `IsLocallyFreeOfRank` reused (QuotScheme.lean:253). Hardest = `Scheme.Modules.glue`; all riders bottom on it |
| QUOT-defs — annihilator char + P2 predicate | ACTIVE | 1–2 | ~80–150 | `IdealSheafData` coherence; rank-`r` local-freeness | gap1+gap2 done. Remaining: `annihilator_ideal` reverse incl. + P2. In QuotScheme.lean — sequence after GF-G1 (import race). 4 stubs protected |
| SNAP-S0 — section graded ring (`SectionGradedRing.lean`) | ACTIVE | 3–6 | ~200–450 | abelian `W.monoidal` + left-adjoint-preserves-coequalizers; `DirectSum.Ring` | Layer 1 + `sectionsMul` done. `tensorPowAdd` gated on crux `IsIso(sh.map(η▷Q))` — Analogue 1 (see Routes) |
| SNAP-S1/S3 — section-module input + `Φ_s` | BLOCKED | 3–6 | ~150–400 | `def:sectionGradedRing` assembly; `existsUnique_hilbertPoly` | Gated on SNAP-S0 + Q1 |

## Completed

| Phase | Iters (done@ · used) | LOC | Files | Key results | Reusable techniques | Pitfalls |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| GF-alg — algebraic core | 022 · ~9 | ~900 | `FlatteningStratification.lean` | `genericFlatnessAlgebraic` axiom-clean (Nitsure §4 dévissage) | `g:=g0·g1`+`exists_multiple_integral_of_isLocalization`; `IsLocalizedModule.iso`; strong induction on base domain | `letI`-built `Algebra A Cg` `isDefEq` dead end; deep stack needs `maxHeartbeats 1600000` |
| FBC RegroupHelper | 011 · 4 | ~120 | `Cohomology_RegroupHelper` | `regroupEquiv` `(A⊗_R R')⊗_A M ≅ R'⊗_R M` | `eT` identity-bridge + `TensorProduct.induction_on` beats transparent-instance diamonds | element `map_smul'` zero-branch needed `erw [TensorProduct.zero_tmul]` |
| GR-cells (charts+cocycle) | 012 · 2 | ~600 | `GrassmannianCells.lean` | big-cell charts, transition maps, `lem:gr_cocycle` (28 decls) | `IsLocalization.Away.lift` for localized transitions; prove matrix forms by `exact` then `rw` | `rw [Matrix.map_mul]` fails on Away-base-changed matrices (algebraMap diamond) |
| SNAP-S2 power-series engine | 012 · 1 | ~180 | `QuotScheme.lean` (`IsRatHilb`) | antidifference + `IsRatHilb.ofDiffEq` (Stacks 00K1 series half) | telescoping via `invOneSubPow`; `IsRatHilb` isolates series bookkeeping | `PowerSeries.C` ring arg implicit; `open … in` before docstring |
| SNAP-S2 graded Hilbert–Serre | 020 · 9 | ~1290 | `GradedHilbertSerre.lean` | `gradedModule_hilbertSeries_rational` (Stacks 00K1) | Route-2 ambient-subquotient pairs (`Naux⊓ℳn`) sidestep quotient gradings | bundled `IsInternal` over quotient/subtype carrier is a hard `isDefEq` dead end |
| QUOT-defs P1 predicates | 011 · 1 | ~90 | `QuotScheme.lean` | schematic/proper-support via `IdealSheafData.ofIdeals`/`.subscheme` | annihilator-ideal-sheaf needs NO QCoh bridge | — |
| QUOT gap1+gap2 — QCoh≃Mod descent + basic-open loc. | 044 · ~16 | ~900 | `QuotScheme.lean` | gap1 `isIso_fromTildeΓ` (opaque-immersion); gap2 `isLocalizedModule_basicOpen` | equivalence-transport beats `IsContinuous`/`↥V`; open-imm pullback-unit IS Final via open-map adjunction | general-U `_of_cover` Hfr unprovable (basic-open only); NEVER positional rw/simp under `X.Modules` diamond |
| GR-glue — glued Grassmannian scheme | 031 · 3 | ~220 | `GrassmannianCells.lean` | `Grassmannian.scheme`=`theGlueData.glued`; `cocyclePhiId` | `GlueData` `f_mono`/`f_hasPullback` default `infer_instance`; cocycle telescopes via rotMid | `HasPullback` diamond needs `maxHeartbeats 1600000`+`erw` |
| QUOT gap1 bridge C — `overRestrictIso` | 031 · 2 | ~120 | `QuotScheme.lean` | `overRestrictIso`/`overRestrictPullbackIso`; over-site↔open equivalence | ring-sheaf id collapses to `rfl`; `pushforwardComp`/`pushforwardCongr`; `cat_disch` | `rw [id_comp]`/`← op_comp` fail on Over/op — use `erw`+term-mode |
| GR-sep — separatedness | 034 · 1 | ~150 | `GrassmannianCells.lean` | `isSeparated` route (b); `diagonalRingMap_surjective` | `Spec ℤ` terminal for `Scheme.{0}` ⟹ `IsTerminal.hom_ext`; `Proj.isSeparated` port | `convert!`/`pullback.map_fst` absent; `Spec.map_comp` rw fails on Scheme-cat diamond |
| GR-proper — valuative-criterion properness | 038 · ~5 | ~330 | `GrassmannianCells.lean` | `isProper`/`lem:gr_proper` (Gr(d,r) proper /ℤ); E1–E6 | `ValuativeCriterion.Existence`; `IsLocalization.Away.lift`; `det_one_updateCol` via cramer | `Matrix.det_updateColumn` absent; `.J` blocks `Finite`; term-mode only |

## Routes

Single route per target; the leg is a fan of independent leaves merging upstream. GF-geo is the live
critical path; GR-quot + SNAP-S0 run in parallel (independent files). FBC parked; QUOT-defs is small
residue behind GF-G1.

**FBC route (PARKED — residual risk acknowledged).** Affine lemma (Stacks 02KH pt 2)
`IsIso pushforwardBaseChangeMap` is free as `conjugateIsoEquiv adjL adjR` of `gammaPushforwardNatIso`
(module content `regroupEquiv` DONE); coherence bottoms at `gstar_transpose` → keystone `_legs_conj`,
which hit the iter-045 FINAL kill-criterion. Element-`ext` and monolithic-β are dead ends; **no fresh
route exists.** This is the project's highest-risk Goal leg: if GF+QUOT+GR all close while the keystone
is still open, FBC becomes the sole merge-back blocker and warrants a dedicated fresh-route escalation
(cross-domain analogist / external sketch), NOT indefinite parking. `keystoneAdjR`/`keystoneBeta`/`huce`
are the launching pad; A2 (affine reduction @2348) + B (Čech-free H⁰-equalizer, eqLocus sub-lane DONE)
gated behind the A1 iso. Un-parks when a lane frees.

**GF route.** Algebraic core `genericFlatnessAlgebraic` DONE (Nitsure §4 induction). Geometric
`genericFlatness` (`[IsQuasicoherent]`+`[IsFiniteType]`) wraps it: affine `Spec A ⊆ S`, finite affine
cover of `p⁻¹(Spec A)`, algebraic form per patch, `V = D(∏ f_j)`, freeness over the localisation. G1
(finite-section module on affine) bottoms at gap1; seam-1 reduces entirely to 1a `gf_localGenerators_restrict`
(restriction-of-generation = epi-preservation of the geometric `pullback U.ι`, via `overRestrictPullbackIso`).

**QUOT route.** (1) `def:hilbert_polynomial` = graded Hilbert function `Φ_s` (Hartshorne I.7.5 / Nitsure §1)
via `existsUnique_hilbertPoly`[`CharZero`] + `gradedHilbertSerre_rational` (DONE). (2) Rationality engine =
Route 2 over ambient pairs `N'≤N` (DONE). (3) SNAP-S1 input GATED on Q1. (4) QUOT-defs: P1+gap1+gap2+annihilator
DONE; remaining = P2 rank-`r` local-freeness. (5) QUOT-repr: GR cells/glue/sep/proper DONE; remaining GR-quot
(rank-`d` quotient + univ.prop) then GR-repr (`RepresentableBy` via strengthened `relative_spec_univ`).

**SNAP-S0 route.** Layer-1 tensor powers/unitors/braiding/counit + lax-Γ `sectionsMul` DONE. `tensorPowAdd`
needs the sheaf-level associator; its crux is the single iso `IsIso(sheafification.map(η_P ▷ Q))`
(`lem:isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`), built via **Analogue 1** (`analogies/snap-route.md`):
transfer the abelian `GrothendieckTopology.W.monoidal` (present in Mathlib) to modules through the
relative-tensor coequalizer (abelian sheafification = left adjoint, preserves coequalizers). That iso ⇒
associator (`cor:sheafTensorObjAssoc`) ⇒ `tensorPowAdd` ⇒ graded assembly. Full `MonoidalCategory
(SheafOfModules)` NOT needed. Route (b) "presheaf+Γ-at-end" PROVED illusory and Analogue 4 "local-freeness
avoids the associator" INSUFFICIENT — both dropped. Fallback if coequalizer plumbing balloons = scope change
(concrete very-ample presentation, or build only the graded module / Hilbert data, deferring the ring).

## Open strategic questions

- **Q1 — SNAP `Φ_s` canonicity (blocks S1).** Needs either chosen-presentation `Φ_s` + a cited Serre `m≫0`
  agreement, or an H¹-free finiteness. Defer until gap1 lands; then retrieve the Serre `m≫0` agreement (the
  "Hartshorne II.5.17" attribution is unverified — read before committing) and decide.
- **GR-quot glue is the single bottleneck.** `chartQuotientMap`/`represents`-sig are independent and land
  first; `universalQuotient`/`tautologicalQuotient`/`functor` all ride on `Scheme.Modules.glue` — timebox it.
- **Merge-back signature check.** Confirm re-signed `genericFlatness`/QUOT decls
  (`[IsQuasicoherent]`+`[IsFiniteType]`) match the parent cone's expected signatures.
- **Shared qcoh-affine-local infra (GF-G1 ∩ QUOT).** gap1+gap2 built QUOT-side; GF-G1 consumes by IMPORT
  (FlatteningStratification imports QuotScheme). Revisit only if a 3rd consumer appears.
- **Q6 — GF-geo G3 parallelism.** G3 (`lem:gf_flat_locality_assembly`, per-patch freeness ⟹ flatness via
  `flat_of_isLocalized_maximal`) is gap1-INDEPENDENT; sequenced after G1 in the GF lane (G1→G3→close).

## Mathlib gaps & new material

Gaps to fill:
- FBC-A: keystone `_legs_conj` close (conjugate recognition over the 3 proved legs); FBC-B: H⁰-as-equalizer
  / finite-affine-cover sheaf condition for `SheafOfModules`.
- GF-geo: **G1** (qcoh+finite-type ⟹ `Γ(F,W)` finite on affine, via gap1; seam-1 = 1a) and **G3**
  (per-patch freeness on a finite cover ⟹ flatness over `Γ(S,U)`). Plus X.Modules↔Spec transport (gap1 recipe).
- SNAP-S0: the sheaf-level associator, crux `IsIso(sheafification.map(η_P ▷ Q))` — Analogue 1 (see Routes).
- QUOT: rank-`r` local-freeness `SheafOfModules.IsLocallyFreeOfRank` (DEFINED, QuotScheme.lean:253; shared
  with GR-quot). GR-quot: Archon-original module-gluing of `SheafOfModules` over `Scheme.GlueData` (Mathlib
  has only abstract `Sites/Descent` IsStack, not instantiated for modules) — `def:scheme_modules_glue`.
- **gap1 + gap2 DONE:** `isIso M.fromTildeΓ` + `isLocalizedModule_basicOpen`, axiom-clean. No residue.

New project material:
- `genericFlatnessAlgebraic` (done), re-signed `genericFlatness` (+`IsQuasicoherent`+`IsFiniteType`).
- Coherence encoding = `[IsQuasicoherent]` + `[IsFiniteType]` over a locally noetherian base.
- QUOT defs with tightened signatures; `Grassmannian` via `QuotFunctor`; representability as `IsRepresentable`.
